beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Celta Vigo - Freiburg - QF1 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 3.title: سيلتا فيغو - فرايبورج - تصفيات 1 - الدوري الأوروبي 2025/2026 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: خسر سيلتا فيجو كل من مبارياته الثلاث الأخيرة أمام الفرق الألمانية، في حين أن هذه ستكون المرة الأولى التي يستضيف فيها فريقًا من الدوري الألماني منذ مارس 2007 - هزيمة 0-1 أمام فيردر بريمن في كأس الاتحاد الأوروبي.
beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Celta Vigo - Fribourg - QF1 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarts de finale - Retour
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Celta Vigo have lost each of their last three games against German sides, while this will be the first time they have hosted a Bundesliga side since March 2007 – a 0-1 defeat to Werder Bremen in the UEFA Cup. Spanish teams have won 10 of their last 11 home major European matches against German teams – but the exception was Real Madrid’s 2-1 defeat to Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League this month.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Le Celta Vigo a perdu chacun de ses trois derniers matches contre des équipes allemandes, alors que ce sera la première fois qu'il accueillera une équipe de Bundesliga depuis mars 2007 – une défaite 0-1 contre le Werder Brême en Coupe UEFA.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Real Sociedad vs Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.title: ريال سوسيداد vs ألافيس - الدوري الإسباني 2025/26 - الأسبوع 31
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: لم يفز ريال سوسيداد بأي من آخر مباراتين له على أرضه ضد ألافيس في الدوري الإسباني، ولم يفز سوى مرة واحدة في ثلاث مباريات متتالية على أرضه دون فوز على فريق فيتوريا في دوري الدرجة الأولى، بين عامي 1999 و2002. فاز ديبورتيفو ألافيس في آخر ثلاث مباريات ضد ريال سوسيداد في الدوري الإسباني؛
beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Real Sociedad vs Alavés - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 31e journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Real Sociedad have not won any of their last two home games against Alavés in LaLiga  and have only once gone three consecutive home matches without a win against the Vitoria side in the top-flight, between 1999 and 2002. Deportivo Alavés have won their last three games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga; they have only managed to win four consecutive matches against three teams in the entire history of the competition: UD Las Palmas in 2001, CD Tenerife in 2002 and Real Valladolid in 2003.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: La Real Sociedad n'a remporté aucun de ses deux derniers matchs à domicile contre Alavés en Liga et n'a disputé qu'une seule fois trois matches consécutifs à domicile sans victoire contre l'équipe de Vitoria dans l'élite, entre 1999 et 2002. Le Deportivo Alavés a remporté ses trois derniers matchs contre la Real Sociedad en Liga ;

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Elche vs Valence - LaLiga Espagnole 2025/26 - 31ème journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Elche CF have picked up points in three of their last seven LaLiga matches against Valencia, after doing so in just two of their previous 13 top-flight encounters. Valencia CF have won seven of their last nine away LaLiga matches against Elche, after managing just two victories in their first 15 visits to the Franjiverde's home ground in the top-flight.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: L'Elche CF a récolté des points lors de trois de ses sept derniers matches de Liga contre Valence, après l'avoir fait lors de seulement deux de ses 13 précédentes rencontres de haut niveau.

beIN SPORTS 3.desc: فاز نادي إشبيلية بثلاث من آخر خمس مباريات على أرضه ضد أتلتيكو مدريد في الدوري الإسباني، بعد أن حقق فوزًا واحدًا فقط في مواجهاته التسعة السابقة على أرضه في المسابقة.
beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Séville vs Atlético de Madrid - Liga espagnole 2025/26 - 31e journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Sevilla FC have won three of their last five home games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, after managing just one victory in their previous nine home meetings in the competition. Club Atlético de Madrid have won six of their last seven LaLiga matches against Sevilla, achieving as many victories as in their previous 17 top-flight encounters.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Le Séville FC a remporté trois de ses cinq derniers matches à domicile contre l'Atlético de Madrid en Liga, après avoir remporté une seule victoire lors de ses neuf précédentes rencontres à domicile dans la compétition.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.original_title: Flavio Cobolli (Ita) vs Vit Kopriva (Cze) - Day 5 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.title: فلافيو كوبولي (إيطاليا) ضد فيت كوبريفا (التشيك) ​​- اليوم الخامس - بطولة ATP 500 BMW المفتوحة بواسطة Bitpanda - ميونيخ 2026
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc: تُقام بطولة ATP 500 على الملاعب الترابية في ميونيخ في الفترة من 13 إلى 19 أبريل في MTTC Iphitos، وهي واحدة من أقدم الأحداث في ألمانيا.
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.title_fr: Flavio Cobolli (Ita) vs Vit Kopriva (Cze) - Jour 5 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc_en: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc_fr: Organisé à Munich du 13 au 19 avril au MTTC Iphitos, le tournoi ATP 500 sur terre battue est l'un des événements les plus anciens d'Allemagne.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc_fr: La Liga 2 est la deuxième division masculine de football professionnel du système de ligue de football espagnol.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Highlights from the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League. The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc: لم يخسر أرسنال أمام سبورتنج لشبونة في المنافسة الأوروبية، في حين أن أرسنال هو الفريق الذي واجهه الفريق البرتغالي في أغلب الأحيان في أوروبا دون الفوز على الإطلاق.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Arsenal reste invaincu face au Sporting CP en compétition européenne, tandis que les Gunners sont l'équipe que les Portugais ont affrontée le plus souvent en Europe sans jamais gagner.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: أتلتيكو مدريد ضد برشلونة - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: ستكون هذه هي المرة السادسة التي يواجه فيها أتلتيكو مدريد وبرشلونة بعضهما البعض هذا الموسم، وهي أكبر مواجهة بينهما في موسم واحد منذ 2013-2014.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Atletico Madrid vs Barcelone - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de finale - Retour
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: This will be the sixth time that Atlético Madrid and Barcelona have faced each other this season, which is their most meetings in a single campaign since 2013-14. Only in 1985-86 have they faced more than six times in the same season. As well as a 2-0 win in the first leg, Atlético Madrid have also beaten Barcelona 4-0 in the Copa Del Rey this season. They last beat them three times in the same campaign back in 1995-96.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Ce sera la sixième fois que l'Atlético Madrid et Barcelone s'affronteront cette saison, ce qui constitue leur plus grand nombre de rencontres en une seule campagne depuis 2013-14.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Aston Villa - Bologna - QF2 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 2.title: أستون فيلا - بولونيا - تصفيات 2 - الدوري الأوروبي 2025/2026 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: حافظ أستون فيلا على نظافة شباكه خمس مرات متتالية على أرضه ضد الأندية الإيطالية في البطولات الأوروبية الكبرى - آخر لاعب سجل في فيلا بارك لفريق إيطالي كان زبيغنيو بونييك في فوز يوفنتوس 2-1 في كأس أوروبا في مارس 1983. منذ فوزه على وست بروميتش 3-1 في هوثورن في مارس 1967، خسر بولونيا زياراته الخمس خارج أرضه إلى إنجلترا في جميع المسابقات الأوروبية.
beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Aston Villa - Bologne - QF2 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarts de finale - Retour
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Aston Villa have kept five consecutive home clean sheets against Italian clubs in major European competition – the last player to score at Villa Park for an Italian team was Zbigniew Boniek in a 2-1 Juventus win in the European Cup in March 1983. Since beating West Brom 3-1 at the Hawthorns in March 1967, Bologna have lost their five away visits to England in all European competition. They’ve lost to Leeds, Fulham, Liverpool  and Aston Villa twice.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Aston Villa a gardé cinq cages inviolées à domicile contre des clubs italiens dans des compétitions européennes majeures – le dernier joueur à marquer à Villa Park pour une équipe italienne était Zbigniew Boniek lors d'une victoire 2-1 de la Juventus en Coupe d'Europe en mars 1983. Depuis sa victoire 3-1 sur West Brom aux Hawthorns en mars 1967, Bologne a perdu ses cinq déplacements en Angleterre dans toutes les compétitions européennes.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: La victoire du Bayern Munich au match aller a mis fin à une série de neuf matchs sans victoire contre le Real Madrid en UEFA Champions League.

beIN SPORTS 8.desc_en: Held in Giza from 13–18 April, the NewGiza P2 is part of the Qatar Airways Premier Padel Tour, featuring top-ranked men’s and women’s pairs competing at the NewGiza Sports Club. The event offers a total prize purse of €250,000, with players competing for ranking points and titles in a key stop of the early-season circuit.
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_fr: Organisé à Gizeh du 13 au 18 avril, le NewGiza P2 fait partie du Qatar Airways Premier Padel Tour, mettant en vedette les duos masculins et féminins les mieux classés en compétition au NewGiza Sports Club.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: La victoire du Bayern Munich au match aller a mis fin à une série de neuf matchs sans victoire contre le Real Madrid en UEFA Champions League.

beIN 4K.original_title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: ارسنال ضد الاتحاد الآسيوي.
beIN 4K.desc: بعد فوزه في أول ثماني مباريات على أرضه أمام بورنموث في جميع المسابقات، خسر أرسنال هذه المباراة بالضبط في الدوري الموسم الماضي بنتيجة 2-1.
beIN 4K.desc_en: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Après avoir remporté chacun de ses huit premiers matchs à domicile contre Bournemouth toutes compétitions confondues, Arsenal a perdu ce match de championnat 2-1 la saison dernière.

beIN 4K.original_title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: مانشستر يونايتد vs ليدز يونايتد - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: لم يخسر مانشستر يونايتد في آخر 18 مباراة على أرضه في الدوري أمام ليدز منذ الخسارة 1-0 في فبراير 1981 تحت قيادة ديف سيكستون.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Manchester United contre Leeds United - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds  since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Manchester United est invaincu lors de ses 18 derniers matches de championnat à domicile contre Leeds depuis une défaite 1-0 en février 1981 sous la direction de Dave Sexton.

beIN 4K.original_title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: ليفربول vs فولهام - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: لم يحقق ليفربول أي فوز في آخر ثلاث مباريات له في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز أمام فولهام.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Liverpool contre Fulham - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Liverpool est sans victoire lors de ses trois derniers matchs de Premier League contre Fulham.

beIN 4K.original_title: Chelsea vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: تشيلسي vs مانشستر سيتي - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: لم يحقق تشيلسي أي فوز في آخر تسع مباريات في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز ضد مانشستر سيتي منذ فوزه خارج أرضه 2-1 في مايو 2021. فاز مانشستر سيتي بأربع من آخر خمس مباريات خارج أرضه في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز ضد تشيلسي، وهو نفس العدد الذي فاز به في زياراته الـ 26 السابقة في الدوري إلى ستامفورد بريدج.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Chelsea contre Manchester City - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City  since a 2-1 away win in May 2021. Manchester City have won four of their last five away Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 26 league visits to Stamford Bridge.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Chelsea est sans victoire lors de ses neuf derniers matchs de Premier League contre Man City depuis une victoire 2-1 à l'extérieur en mai 2021. Manchester City a remporté quatre de ses cinq derniers matchs à l'extérieur de Premier League contre Chelsea, autant que lors de ses 26 précédentes visites de championnat à Stamford Bridge.

beIN 4K.original_title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: ارسنال ضد الاتحاد الآسيوي.
beIN 4K.desc: بعد فوزه في أول ثماني مباريات على أرضه أمام بورنموث في جميع المسابقات، خسر أرسنال هذه المباراة بالضبط في الدوري الموسم الماضي بنتيجة 2-1.
beIN 4K.desc_en: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Après avoir remporté chacun de ses huit premiers matchs à domicile contre Bournemouth toutes compétitions confondues, Arsenal a perdu ce match de championnat 2-1 la saison dernière.

beIN 4K.original_title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027

beIN 4K.desc: لم يخسر مانشستر يونايتد في آخر 18 مباراة على أرضه في الدوري أمام ليدز منذ الخسارة 1-0 في فبراير 1981 تحت قيادة ديف سيكستون.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Manchester United contre Leeds United - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds  since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Manchester United est invaincu lors de ses 18 derniers matches de championnat à domicile contre Leeds depuis une défaite 1-0 en février 1981 sous la direction de Dave Sexton.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: La victoire du Bayern Munich au match aller a mis fin à une série de neuf matchs sans victoire contre le Real Madrid en UEFA Champions League.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: أولمبيك ليون vs لوريان - الدوري الفرنسي 1 2025/2026 الأسبوع 29

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Olympique Lyonnais vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Lyon have lost just one of their nine Ligue 1 matches against Lorient when Les Merlus have been newly promoted to the top-flight, which was in the reverse fixture this season ; the only time OL have failed to score in such encounters. Lyon have not won any of their last nine matches in all competitions, after winning each of their previous 13. OL have only gone 10 matches without a win in all competitions on three occasions in their history: October-December 1959, April-September 1962  and June-November 2023.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Lyon n'a perdu qu'un seul de ses neuf matches de Ligue 1 contre Lorient alors que les Merlus ont été nouvellement promus dans l'élite, ce qui était le cas lors du match inverse cette saison ;

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: None of the seven meetings between Liverpool  and Paris SG  in all competitions have been drawn, with two of the Reds’ three wins coming at home. Paris SG won 1-0 at Anfield in the UEFA Champions League last 16 last season. The only sides to win consecutive away games against Liverpool in European competition are Barcelona and Atalanta, with neither of those doing so in back-to-back campaigns.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Arsenal reste invaincu face au Sporting CP en compétition européenne, tandis que les Gunners sont l'équipe que les Portugais ont affrontée le plus souvent en Europe sans jamais gagner.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: A cornerstone of the early-season WTA calendar, the Qatar TotalEnergies Open takes place on outdoor hard courts at the Khalifa International Tennis & Squash Complex in Doha. A 56-player singles draw competes for 1000 ranking points and a $4,088,211 USD total financial commitment, attracting the world’s top players.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Pierre angulaire du calendrier WTA de début de saison, l'Open Qatar TotalEnergies se déroule sur des courts extérieurs en dur du Khalifa International Tennis & Squash Complex à Doha.

beIN SPORTS.title_fr: Al Ahli vs Al Rayyan - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W5
beIN SPORTS.desc_en: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.
beIN SPORTS.desc_fr: La Ligue Qatarienne est la ligue officielle de football du Qatar.

beIN SPORTS.original_title: Montpellier vs Dunkirk - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
beIN SPORTS.title: مونبلييه vs دونكيرك - LNH Division 1 - الدوري الفرنسي لكرة اليد
beIN SPORTS.desc: انغمس في إثارة كرة اليد الفرنسية مع Liqui Moly Starligue، القسم الأول من LNH سابقًا. تأسس هذا الحدث في الدوري الممتاز عام 1952، ويضم 16 فريقًا من أفضل الفرق يتقاتلون من أجل المجد.
beIN SPORTS.title_fr: Montpellier vs Dunkerque - LNH Division 1 - Starligue Française de Handball
beIN SPORTS.desc_en: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
beIN SPORTS.desc_fr: Plongez dans l'effervescence du handball français avec la Liqui Moly Starligue, anciennement LNH Division 1. Créée en 1952, cet événement de première division rassemble 16 meilleures équipes qui se battent pour la gloire.

Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
beIN SPORTS.desc_fr: Plongez dans l'effervescence du handball français avec la Liqui Moly Starligue, anciennement LNH Division 1. Créée en 1952, cet événement de première division rassemble 16 meilleures équipes qui se battent pour la gloire.

beIN SPORTS.title_fr: Toulouse vs Poitiers - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
beIN SPORTS.desc_en: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.
beIN SPORTS.desc_fr: La meilleure compétition masculine de volley-ball en France, la LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), propose une saison de clubs d'élite s'affrontant dans une ligue aller-retour avant les séries éliminatoires.
